name: Montblanc Writers Edition Goethe LE1808
description: Only 1808 pieces exist in celebration of the publication year of Faust.
descriptionLong: The carmine red (burgundy-toned) barrel is inspired by the color of the ceremonial sash worn by Goethe in his portraits, while the golden decorative pattern is derived from the design of the House Order of Vigilance (Order of the White Falcon) awarded to him at the Weimar court. The slightly curved cap is designed to evoke the historical chemist’s glass jars collected by Goethe during his pursuits as a scientist and natural researcher. The leaf-shaped clip reflects Goethe’s botanical studies and his scientific work The Metamorphosis of Plants (Die Metamorphose der Pflanzen). The cone is engraved with a scene of Faust summoning the Earth Spirit, inspired by Goethe’s own sketches. The nib features a motif based on Eugène Delacroix’s illustrations of Faust.
